allow:
Bash(
echo "=== Phone number presence ==="
grep -l "+91 98765 43210\\|919876543210" "c:\\Users\\vijes\\Videos\\gensets\\"*.html | wc -l

echo "=== WhatsApp links ==="
grep -l "wa.me/919876543210" "c:\\Users\\vijes\\Videos\\gensets\\"*.html | wc -l

echo "=== Float WhatsApp on all pages ==="
grep -l "float-whatsapp" "c:\\Users\\vijes\\Videos\\gensets\\"*.html | wc -l

echo "=== Mobile bar on all pages ==="
grep -l "mobile-bar" "c:\\Users\\vijes\\Videos\\gensets\\"*.html | wc -l

echo "=== Back to top on all pages ==="
grep -l "backToTop\\|back-to-top" "c:\\Users\\vijes\\Videos\\gensets\\"*.html | wc -l

echo "=== Footer on all pages ==="
grep -l "site-footer\\|footer-grid" "c:\\Users\\vijes\\Videos\\gensets\\"*.html | wc -l

echo "=== No cart/pricing/checkout ==="
grep -ri "add to cart\\|checkout\\|buy now\\|price\\|₹\\|shopping cart" "c:\\Users\\vijes\\Videos\\gensets\\"*.html | wc -l

echo "=== img-wrapper + data-replace ==="
grep -c "data-replace" "c:\\Users\\vijes\\Videos\\gensets\\index.html"
grep -c "data-replace" "c:\\Users\\vijes\\Videos\\gensets\\about.html"
grep -c "data-replace" "c:\\Users\\vijes\\Videos\\gensets\\products.html"
grep -c "data-replace" "c:\\Users\\vijes\\Videos\\gensets\\services.html"
grep -c "data-replace" "c:\\Users\\vijes\\Videos\\gensets\\industries.html"

echo "=== Image replacement guide in every html ==="
